001package net.pl3x.guithium.api.gui.element;
002
003import java.util.Objects;
004import net.pl3x.guithium.api.gui.Vec2;
005import net.pl3x.guithium.api.key.Key;
006import org.jetbrains.annotations.NotNull;
007import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
008
009/**
010 * Represents a line element.
011 */
012public class Line extends AbstractElement<Line> {
013    private Vec2 endPos;
014    private Vec2 endAnchor;
015    private Vec2 endOffset;
016    private Float width;
017    private int startColor;
018    private int endColor;
019
020    /**
021     * Create a new line element.
022     *
023     * @param key Unique identifier
024     */
025    public Line(@NotNull String key) {
026        this(Key.of(key));
027    }
028
029    /**
030     * Create a new line element.
031     *
032     * @param key Unique identifier
033     */
034    public Line(@NotNull Key key) {
035        super(key, Type.LINE);
036    }
037
038    /**
039     * Create a new line element.
040     *
041     * @param key Unique identifier
042     * @return New line element
043     */
044    @NotNull
045    public static Line of(@NotNull String key) {
046        return of(Key.of(key));
047    }
048
049    /**
050     * Create a new line element.
051     *
052     * @param key Unique identifier
053     * @return New line element
054     */
055    @NotNull
056    public static Line of(@NotNull Key key) {
057        return new Line(key);
058    }
059
060    /**
061     * Get this line's end position from the end anchor position.
062     * <p>
063     * If null, default end position <code>0,0</code> will be used.
064     *
065     * @return End position from end anchor
066     */
067    @Nullable
068    public Vec2 getEndPos() {
069        return this.endPos;
070    }
071
072    /**
073     * Set this line's end position from the end anchor position.
074     * <p>
075     * If null, default end position <code>0,0</code> will be used.
076     *
077     * @param x X (horizontal) end position
078     * @param y Y (vertical) end position
079     * @return This line
080     */
081    @NotNull
082    public Line setEndPos(float x, float y) {
083        setEndPos(Vec2.of(x, y));
084        return this;
085    }
086
087    /**
088     * Set this line's end position from the end anchor position.
089     * <p>
090     * If null, default end position <code>0,0</code> will be used.
091     *
092     * @param pos End position
093     * @return This line
094     */
095    @NotNull
096    public Line setEndPos(@Nullable Vec2 pos) {
097        this.endPos = pos;
098        return this;
099    }
100
101    /**
102     * Get this line's end anchor position on the screen.
103     * <p>
104     * This is represented as a percentage (0.0-1.0) of the parent's size.
105     * <p>
106     * If null, default end anchor <code>0,0</code> will be used.
107     *
108     * @return End anchor position
109     */
110    @Nullable
111    public Vec2 getEndAnchor() {
112        return this.endAnchor;
113    }
114
115    /**
116     * Set this line's end anchor position on the screen.
117     * <p>
118     * This is represented as a percentage (0.0-1.0) of the parent's size.
119     * <p>
120     * If null, default end anchor <code>0,0</code> will be used.
121     *
122     * @param x X (horizontal) end anchor
123     * @param y Y (vertical) end anchor
124     * @return This line
125     */
126    @NotNull
127    public Line setEndAnchor(float x, float y) {
128        setEndAnchor(Vec2.of(x, y));
129        return this;
130    }
131
132    /**
133     * Set this line's end anchor position on the screen.
134     * <p>
135     * This is represented as a percentage (0.0-1.0) of the parent's size.
136     * <p>
137     * If null, default end anchor <code>0,0</code> will be used.
138     *
139     * @param anchor End anchor position
140     * @return This line
141     */
142    @NotNull
143    public Line setEndAnchor(@Nullable Vec2 anchor) {
144        this.endAnchor = anchor;
145        return this;
146    }
147
148    /**
149     * Get this line's end offset position on the screen.
150     * <p>
151     * This is represented as a percentage (0.0-1.0) of the parent's size.
152     * <p>
153     * If null, default end offset <code>0,0</code> will be used.
154     *
155     * @return End offset position
156     */
157    @Nullable
158    public Vec2 getEndOffset() {
159        return this.endOffset;
160    }
161
162    /**
163     * Set this line's end offset position on the screen.
164     * <p>
165     * This is represented as a percentage (0.0-1.0) of the parent's size.
166     * <p>
167     * If null, default end offset <code>0,0</code> will be used.
168     *
169     * @param x X (horizontal) end offset
170     * @param y Y (vertical) end offset
171     * @return This line
172     */
173    @NotNull
174    public Line setEndOffset(float x, float y) {
175        setEndOffset(Vec2.of(x, y));
176        return this;
177    }
178
179    /**
180     * Set this line's end offset position on the screen.
181     * <p>
182     * This is represented as a percentage (0.0-1.0) of the parent's size.
183     * <p>
184     * If null, default end offset <code>0,0</code> will be used.
185     *
186     * @param offset End offset position
187     * @return This line
188     */
189    @NotNull
190    public Line setEndOffset(@Nullable Vec2 offset) {
191        this.endOffset = offset;
192        return this;
193    }
194
195    /**
196     * Get this line's width in scaled pixels.
197     * <p>
198     * If null, default width <code>1.0</code> will be used.
199     *
200     * @return Line width
201     */
202    @Nullable
203    public Float getWidth() {
204        return this.width;
205    }
206
207    /**
208     * Set this line's width in scaled pixels.
209     * <p>
210     * If null, default width <code>1.0</code> will be used.
211     *
212     * @param width Line width
213     * @return This line
214     */
215    @NotNull
216    public Line setWidth(@Nullable Float width) {
217        this.width = width;
218        return this;
219    }
220
221    /**
222     * Get the starting color for this line.
223     *
224     * @return Starting color
225     */
226    public int getStartColor() {
227        return this.startColor;
228    }
229
230    /**
231     * Set the starting color for this line.
232     *
233     * @param color Starting color
234     * @return This line
235     */
236    @NotNull
237    public Line setStartColor(int color) {
238        this.startColor = color;
239        return this;
240    }
241
242    /**
243     * Get the ending color for this line.
244     *
245     * @return Ending color
246     */
247    public int getEndColor() {
248        return this.endColor;
249    }
250
251    /**
252     * Set the ending color for this line.
253     *
254     * @param color Ending color
255     * @return This line
256     */
257    @NotNull
258    public Line setEndColor(int color) {
259        this.endColor = color;
260        return this;
261    }
262
263    /**
264     * Set the color for this line.
265     * <p>
266     * Both the start and end colors will be set to the specified color.
267     *
268     * @param color Line color
269     * @return This line
270     */
271    @NotNull
272    public Line setColor(int color) {
273        setStartColor(color);
274        setEndColor(color);
275        return this;
276    }
277
278    @Override
279    public boolean equals(@Nullable Object obj) {
280        if (!super.equals(obj)) {
281            return false;
282        }
283        Line other = (Line) obj;
284        return Objects.equals(getEndPos(), other.getEndPos())
285                && Objects.equals(getEndAnchor(), other.getEndAnchor())
286                && Objects.equals(getEndOffset(), other.getEndOffset())
287                && Objects.equals(getWidth(), other.getWidth())
288                && Objects.equals(getStartColor(), other.getStartColor())
289                && Objects.equals(getEndColor(), other.getEndColor());
290    }
291
292    @Override
293    public int hashCode() {
294        // pacifies codefactor.io
295        return super.hashCode();
296    }
297}
